# Diagnosis Checklist

Use this checklist before producing any daily plan.

## A. Roadmap HTML Extraction
- Current week and theme
- goal
- task
- output
- must_do
- optional
- minimum_bar
- bonus
- research_focus
- paper_goal
- background knowledge
- recommended resources
- linkage with previous and next weeks

## B. Journal Extraction
- What is already done
- What is partially done
- What has been advanced in recent days
- Current blockers
- Completed experiments / prompt revisions / failure analyses
- Existing evidence artifacts
- Next step originally planned

## C. README Extraction
- Project structure
- Existing modules/files/scripts
- Current capability boundary
- Implemented vs planned

## D. Diagnosis Output Checks
- Completed items are not re-scheduled as relearning
- Partially completed items become verify/consolidate tasks
- Missing minimum_bar parts are explicit
- Time-feasibility for remaining week is explicit
- Strategy is written in exactly three practical sentences

## E. Unknowns Policy
- Label each unclear point as Known / Inferred / Unknown
- Ask only minimal clarifying questions for missing critical facts
- Continue planning with explicit assumptions when possible
